skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips.
skill.summary: AI-powered video production agent that creates short-form videos (5-120 seconds) for social media, marketing, and content creation.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected 534 patterns across 13 files, all evaluated as false positives. The skill is a legitimate video production API client that uses standard bash tooling (curl, jq) to communicate with Pexo.ai services. External commands are network requests to authenticated API endpoints. Filesystem access is limited to config storage and temp files. Environment variable access is for API key storage. No malicious intent or security risks identified.

low_findings.title: Authenticated External API Calls
low_findings.description: Skill makes authenticated HTTP requests to external API (pexo.ai) using curl with API key from config. This is the intended functionality for video production service - all network traffic is to official Pexo endpoints only.

low_findings.title: Config File Access
low_findings.description: Skill reads API configuration from ~/.pexo/config file. This is standard practice for CLI tool credentials - no security concern as it only reads the user's own config file.

low_findings.title: Temp File Creation
low_findings.description: Skill creates temporary files in ~/.pexo/tmp for caching downloaded assets and HTTP responses. Standard bash pattern using mktemp - files are cleaned up after use.

content.value_statement: Pexo AI Video Agent automates short-form video production (5-120 seconds) for social media, marketing, and content. Upload your assets and let AI handle scriptwriting, editing, and final rendering. Get professional videos without video editing skills.
actual_capabilities: Create short videos (5-120 seconds) in multiple aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1)
Upload and reference images, videos, and audio files in video projects
Handle interactive preview selection when AI offers multiple options
Poll for project status and deliver final video with download links
Support revisions on existing videos by reusing project IDs
Validate asset references and provide clear error messages
limitations: Requires valid Pexo API key and account - video production consumes credits
Production time takes 15-20 minutes for a 15-second video
Cannot crawl web URLs - files must be downloaded locally before upload
Network connectivity required for all operations
Asset IDs must be wrapped in specific XML-like tags in messages

use_cases.title: Social Media Content Creator
use_cases.description: Create engaging TikTok videos, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts from product images or concepts. Upload photos, describe the video style, and get formatted content ready for each platform.

use_cases.title: Marketing Professional
use_cases.description: Generate product promotional videos and brand videos quickly. Provide product images and marketing copy, then receive edited videos with transitions, music, and professional pacing.

use_cases.title: Business Owner
use_cases.description: Create explainer videos and promotional clips without hiring video editors. Describe your product or service, upload relevant assets, and get a polished video in under 20 minutes.

prompt_templates.title: Create Product Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second product video for my shoes. I've uploaded product shots. Make it energetic with dynamic transitions suitable for Instagram Reels.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to promote a product on social media with uploaded images

prompt_templates.title: Generate TikTok Content
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a 15-second TikTok video about my restaurant. Focus on the atmosphere and signature dishes. Use trending music style.
prompt_templates.scenario: User needs vertical video content for TikTok platform

prompt_templates.title: Create Explainer Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 60-second explainer video about how my app works. I'll upload screenshots. Keep it simple and clear for non-technical users.
prompt_templates.scenario: User needs to explain a product or service to potential customers

prompt_templates.title: Revision Request
prompt_templates.prompt: The previous video is good but please make it faster-paced. Focus more on the product features in the first 10 seconds. Use more energetic transitions.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to refine an existing video project with specific feedback

output_examples.input: Create a 30-second promotional video for my coffee shop
output_examples.output:

📹 Production started (estimated 15-20 minutes)
🔗 Track progress: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_abc123

[After 18 minutes]
✨ Video ready!
📥 Download: https://pexo-assets.oss-us-east-1.aliyuncs.com/video.mp4?signature=...
🔗 Project: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_abc123

Satisfied or want revisions?

output_examples.input: Make a TikTok video from these product photos [uploads 3 images]
output_examples.output:

🎬 Video production started
⏱️ Estimated time: 15-20 minutes
🔗 Monitor: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_xyz789

[Polling...]
🎬 Ready!
📥 Download: [full URL with all parameters]
💡 Tip: Use vertical aspect ratio for TikTok (9:16)

output_examples.input: The video is too slow, make it more dynamic
output_examples.output:
📝 Feedback sent to Pexo
⏳ Revisions in progress...
🔗 Project: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_abc123

[After polling]
✅ Revision complete!
📥 Updated video: [download URL]
🎬 Pacing increased, transitions added as requested

best_practices: Copy user messages exactly when passing to pexo-chat.sh - only add asset ID tags for uploaded files
Wait at least 60 seconds between pexo-project-get.sh polling calls to avoid unnecessary API load
Send video URLs as plain text with all query parameters - markdown formatting can break authentication
Create new projects for new videos, reuse project IDs for revisions on existing videos
Run pexo-doctor.sh before first use to verify configuration and dependencies
anti_patterns: Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style descriptions that the user didn't specify - let Pexo's video agent ask
Do not wrap video URLs in markdown [text](url) format - always send as plain text with full query parameters
Do not call pexo-chat.sh during WAIT status - this triggers duplicate video production
Do not send bare asset IDs in messages without wrapping them in <original-image> tags
Do not truncate signed URLs - removing query parameters causes 403 Forbidden errors

faq.question: What video lengths can Pexo create?
faq.answer: Pexo creates short videos from 5 to 120 seconds. Common lengths are 15 seconds for TikTok/Instagram Reels, 30 seconds for product videos, and 60 seconds for explainers.

faq.question: How long does video production take?
faq.answer: Approximately 15-20 minutes for a 15-second video. Longer and more complex videos take additional time. The skill polls automatically and notifies you when complete.

faq.question: What file types can I upload?
faq.answer: Images: jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic. Videos: mp4, mov, avi. Audio: mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac. All files are uploaded to your project for reference.

faq.question: Do I need video editing skills?
faq.answer: No. Pexo's AI handles all creative work including scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music. You provide the concept and assets, Pexo produces the video.

faq.question: What aspect ratios are supported?
faq.answer: Pexo supports 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (vertical/portrait), and 1:1 (square). These cover YouTube, TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Facebook formats.

faq.question: How do I get a Pexo API key?
faq.answer: Visit https://pexo.ai to create an account. Your API key uses the sk- prefix and is stored in ~/.pexo/config. Run pexo-doctor.sh to verify your setup.
